SF-7001.subject: Blu-cut coating peeling after 3 months
SF-7001.product: Vincent Chase Air VC E14020 | Blu-Cut Lens
SF-7001.description: Customer reports blu-cut coating has started peeling at the edges of both lenses. Purchased 3 months ago.

messages.text:
Hi Priya! 👋

Sorry for the delay on your blu-cut coating peeling issue (Case SF-7001). This shouldn't happen within 3 months.

I'd like to arrange a free replacement for your Vincent Chase glasses. Can you share your preferred store location or should we schedule a home pickup?
Customer opted for home pickup. Escalated to ops team to arrange courier collection from Mumbai address and lens replacement under warranty.

SF-7002.subject: Order not delivered, 8 days past EDD
SF-7002.description: Order promised by April 12, still not delivered. Tracking shows stuck at Bengaluru hub.

messages.text:
Hi Rahul! 👋

Sorry your John Jacobs frames (ORD-88455) are delayed at our Bengaluru hub. I know you've been waiting since April 12.

Let me personally escalate this today and get you a confirmed delivery date by EOD. Would that work?

- Lenskart Care Team
Order stuck at Bengaluru hub for 8 days past EDD. Escalated to ops for priority delivery + Rs 100 wallet credit as per delay policy.

SF-7003.subject: Wrong power in right lens
SF-7003.product: Lenskart Air LA E13097 | Single Vision
SF-7003.description: Customer complains of headache, blurry vision in right eye since receiving glasses. Rx says -4.50, worried wrong power dispensed.

messages.text:
Hi Anjali! 👋

Sorry for the delay on your case SF-7003 regarding the power issue in your right lens. We completely understand your concern about the headaches and blurry vision.

Can we arrange a free home eye check-up today or tomorrow to verify and resolve this immediately? 

- Team Lenskart

SF-7004.subject: How to claim warranty in Dubai
SF-7004.description: Frame hinge broken within 4 months. Customer in Dubai, asking about warranty claim process.

messages.text:
Hi Mohammed! 👋

Sorry for the delay on your Ray-Ban warranty case (SF-7004). Since your frame hinge broke within warranty period, I can help you process this right away.

Could you share a quick photo of the damaged hinge? I'll fast-track your replacement immediately.

SF-6988.subject: Progressive lens adaptation issue
SF-6988.description: Customer unable to adapt to first progressive lens. Switched to single-vision under 30-day guarantee.

messages.text: Switched to single-vision at no cost under 30-day progressive adaptation guarantee. Refund of upgrade charge processed.

SF-7005.subject: Frame arrived with visible scratches
SF-7005.description: Frame arrived with two visible scratches on left temple arm. Clearly damaged in transit or QC failed.

SF-7006.subject: Refund not received after 12 days
SF-7006.product: Vincent Chase VC E12234 | Single Vision
SF-7006.description: Returned frame on April 10, refund of Rs 2,799 still not credited to HDFC card. Return QC was approved.

messages.text: Refund delayed beyond 7 business days after QC approval. Escalated to payments team for immediate processing to HDFC card ending in customer's account.

SF-7007.subject: Home eye test appointment cancelled twice
SF-7007.description: Home eye test scheduled April 18, cancelled by optometrist last minute. Rescheduled for April 21, cancelled again.

messages.text: Gold member, home eye test cancelled twice. Escalated to ops for priority scheduling with guaranteed slot within 24 hrs.

SF-7008.subject: Progressive lens adaptation issue
SF-7008.description: High-power progressive lens, customer unable to adapt after 10 days. Reports dizziness and eye strain.

SF-7009.subject: Contact lens wrong power delivered
SF-7009.description: Ordered +2.00 and +2.25 power contact lenses. Received box has +1.75 and +1.50 printed. Unopened.

SF-7010.subject: EMI payment deducted twice
SF-7010.product: Vincent Chase Titan VC T8090 | Photochromic
SF-7010.description: EMI of Rs 1,067 for first month was auto-debited twice on April 20 via Bajaj Finserv. Two SMS confirmations received.

SF-7011.subject: Gold membership auto-renewed without notice
SF-7011.description: Gold membership of Rs 600 auto-deducted from UPI on April 22. Customer says he didn't want to renew.

messages.text: Customer confirmed refund request for unwanted auto-renewal (Rs 600). Also requested membership cancellation to prevent future auto-renewal. Escalating to billing team for full refund processing and membership termination.

SF-7012.subject: Want to exchange frame for different style
SF-7012.description: Received frame does not suit face shape. Wants to exchange within 14-day window for a Vincent Chase round style.

SF-7013.subject: First order — can't login to app to track
SF-7013.product: Lenskart Air LA E12001 | Zero Power
SF-7013.description: New customer, first order. Getting 'invalid OTP' error repeatedly on mobile app login. Order was placed as guest.

SF-7014.subject: Price dropped after I ordered, want difference
SF-7014.product: Vincent Chase VC E11095 | Single Vision
SF-7014.description: Ordered on April 18 at Rs 3,499. Today same frame showing Rs 2,799 in 'Summer Sale'. Requesting Rs 700 refund.

SF-7015.subject: International shipping stuck at Singapore customs
SF-7015.description: International order to Singapore stuck at customs since April 16. Tracking shows 'pending duty clearance'.

messages.text: Order ORD-89360 held at Singapore customs for 7 days. Customer has not received clearance notice. Escalated to international ops team to coordinate with courier and customs broker for expedited release.

SF-7016.subject: Asking if lens can be replaced in Bangkok
SF-7016.product: Lenskart Hustlr LH E13050 | Single Vision
SF-7016.description: Customer visiting Bangkok for work, wants to know if lens can be replaced at any local Lenskart-affiliated store.

SF-7017.subject: Prescription unclear — which lens index recommended
SF-7017.description: Customer has -2.00 SPH with -1.75 cyl. Asking whether 1.6 or 1.67 lens index is right. Budget Rs 5000.

SF-7018.subject: Want to add sister as Gold family member
SF-7018.description: Gold member wants to add her sister under the family add-on at Rs 200. Asking process and whether sister's future orders apply Gold pricing.

SF-7019.subject: Delivered to wrong address
SF-7019.product: Vincent Chase Polarized VC E15001 | Sunglasses
SF-7019.description: Package marked delivered on April 22 but customer didn't receive it. Delivery photo shows a different apartment building.

SF-7020.subject: Second pair 50% off not applied at checkout
SF-7020.product: Vincent Chase VC E15120 | Single Vision (2nd pair)
SF-7020.description: Gold member eligible for flat 50% off on 2nd pair. Checkout charged full price. Wants refund of the differential.

SF-6989.subject: Lens replacement after Rx change
SF-6989.description: Customer's Rx changed within 6 months. Free lens redo availed under Gold benefit.

messages.text: Free lens redo processed under Gold 6-month Rx-change benefit.

SF-6990.subject: Warranty claim — frame hinge snapped
SF-6990.description: Frame hinge snapped within 5 months, manufacturing defect confirmed by QC. Replacement frame issued.

messages.text: Full replacement issued under 1-year frame warranty.
